_comment: DEV-TIME MCP servers for the team's Claude Code sessions. The PRODUCT runtime reaches Soda Straw via its OWN Python MCP client in the FastAPI backend — separate from this file. Secrets come from your shell env via ${VAR} interpolation; never hard-code tokens. Teammates are prompted ONCE to approve these on first use. soda-straw: confirm exact URL + auth at sodastraw.ai/trial/start; if it uses OAuth instead of a static bearer, delete the headers block and let /mcp drive the flow on a 401. think-strategies: step_back/self_consistency/session-manager, used by spec-critic + demo-readiness-reviewer. context7: live version-correct library docs (works for many libs without a key).
